title: LIKE clause
poc: create table t1 (name varchar(1024), address varchar(1024), age int);
create table t2 (street varchar(1024), id int);
select name from t1, t2 where t1.address LIKE 'amsterdam';
select name from t1, t2 where t1.address LIKE t2.street;
select name from t1, t2 where t1.address like t2.";
select name from t1, t2 where t1.address like street;
key_bug_features: LIKE clause with unqualified column reference
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3 (email varchar(1024) NOT NULL, phone varchar(15), age int CHECK (age >= 0));
CREATE TABLE t4 (description varchar(1024), id int PRIMARY KEY);
SELECT email FROM t3, t4 WHERE t3.email LIKE '%' || t4.description || '%';
